data.body:
IMPLEMENTATION LANDED (code) on branch `feat/gerrit-ci-verified-gate` — 6 commits, 20 files, +1364 lines. All artifacts authored + validated (git-config parse, YAML parse, `bash -n`, `terraform fmt -check` + `terraform validate` pass). NOT yet deployed — deploy/E2E need live AWS/GitHub/Gerrit access (operator).

Per-story commits:
- S1 86fa756e — project.config: Verified label + ACL + submit-req shipped INACTIVE (applicableIf=is:false); ADR-0020; gerrit-aws-setup §6.
- S2 8163cf0d — replication.config: scoped `refs/changes/*` refspec (NOT refs/*, protects refs/meta/config token); ADR-0021.
- S3 300b8c07 — Dockerfile.gerrit (base+Python+g2p, in-container per the plan-review BLOCK fix); materialize-g2p-config.sh (pre-boot, SSM PAT, 0600); ini template; plugins/README (hooks core); ADR-0022.
- S5 e6e5d42c — .github/workflows/gerrit-verify.yaml: 3-job g2p shape (clear-vote→build-and-test[reuses test.yml checks]→vote), actions SHA-pinned.
- S4 895c5745 — ssm.tf: /rebar/prod/g2p-github-pat + /rebar/prod/ci-gerrit-ssh-key slots; setup-ci-service-account.sh; g2p-ci-credentials runbook (rotation/retire); ADR-0023 (inbound SSH vote).
- S6 62f56d0c — monitoring_1fa8.tf (g2p_dispatch_errors alarm) + observability.sh metric; two-vote-gate-rollback runbook (back-out + activation + E2E steps); CONTRIBUTING.md two-vote flow.

OPERATOR-PENDING (live access; documented in infra/runbooks/g2p-ci-credentials.md + two-vote-gate-rollback.md):
1. Populate SSM: g2p-github-pat (fine-grained, repo=navapbc/rebar, Actions RW + Contents/Metadata R) + ci-gerrit-ssh-key.
2. Generate CI keypair; run setup-ci-service-account.sh on live Gerrit; register the public key.
3. Set GitHub repo vars GERRIT_SERVER/GERRIT_SSH_USER/GERRIT_KNOWN_HOSTS/GERRIT_URL + secret GERRIT_SSH_PRIVKEY.
4. terraform apply (SSM slots + alarm); confirm SNS subscription.
5. Build/deploy the extended Gerrit image; run materialize-g2p-config.sh pre-boot; enable the `hooks` core plugin.
6. E2E while the gate is still INACTIVE (dispatch→CI→vote-back→recheck→patchset-reset).
7. ACTIVATE: delete `applicableIf=is:false` from project.config + re-push (setup-project.sh) once E2E passes.

Note: `main` is Gerrit-locked, so this lands via Gerrit (refs/for/main), not a GitHub PR — routing TBD with the operator.

Stories left in_progress (assignee claude): closing needs the completion-verifier, which correctly requires deploy/E2E evidence (operator).
